title: Correlated subquery on the RHS of an IN operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t2(b, c) VALUES(1, 1.5), (2, NULL);
SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE a NOT IN (SELECT b FROM t2 WHERE c IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Correlated subquery in NOT IN operator
